instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall inhibit gear shifting when transmission oil temperature exceeds the safety threshold.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable shift commands when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Max_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Max_Temp THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Gear_Position = Current_Gear AND Shift_Command = Disabled THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Activate_Temperature_Warning

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear shifts when a transmission fault is detected.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit shift commands when Shift_Actuator_Fault is active.

L4_requirements: IF Shift_Actuator_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Shift_Actuator_Fault = FALSE THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Shift_Command = Disabled THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Gear_Position_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF CAN_Communication_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall inhibit gear shift when the gear state is invalid.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject shift requests when Actual_Gear does not match Commanded_Gear.

L4_requirements: IF Actual_Gear != Commanded_Gear THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Actual_Gear = Commanded_Gear THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Gear_Position_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Shift_Request = TRUE AND Actual_Gear != Commanded_Gear THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Actual_Gear = Unknown_State THEN Shift_Command = Disabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear shifting during ECU startup.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable shift commands when TCU_State equals Startup.

L4_requirements: IF TCU_State = Startup THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF TCU_State = Drive THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF TCU_State = Initialization THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF TCU_State = Startup AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF TCU_State = Startup THEN Maintain_Current_Gear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear shifting when vehicle speed exceeds safe limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit shift commands when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Max_Safe_Shift_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed > Max_Safe_Shift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Max_Safe_Shift_Speed THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Vehicle_Speed > Max_Safe_Shift_Speed AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Vehicle_Speed > Critical_Speed THEN Activate_Safety_Warning

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall inhibit shifting when brake pedal is applied in reverse mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject shift commands when Brake_Pedal_Status is active and Gear_Position equals Reverse.

L4_requirements: IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Pressed AND Gear_Position = Reverse THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Released THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Gear_Position = Reverse AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Brake_Signal_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Gear_Position != Reverse THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall inhibit gear shifts during CAN communication faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable shift commands when CAN_Communication_Fault is detected.

L4_requirements: IF CAN_Communication_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF CAN_Communication_Fault = FALSE THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF CAN_Communication_Fault = TRUE AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear shifting when transmission oil pressure is below safe limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit shift commands when Clutch_Pressure falls below Pressure_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Clutch_Pressure < Pressure_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Clutch_Pressure >= Pressure_Limit THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Clutch_Pressure_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Clutch_Pressure < Pressure_Limit AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Clutch_Pressure < Critical_Pressure THEN Trigger_Fault_Code

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear shifts when the system enters limp-home mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable shift commands when TCU_State equals Limp_Mode.

L4_requirements: IF TCU_State = Limp_Mode THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF TCU_State != Limp_Mode THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF TCU_State = Limp_Mode AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Limp_Mode = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF System_Reset = TRUE THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent shifting when multiple sensor faults occur.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit gear shift when more than one sensor fault is active.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE AND Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Sensor_Fault_Count > 1 THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Sensor_Fault_Count <= 1 THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Multiple_Faults = TRUE AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Fault_Status = Critical THEN Maintain_Current_Gear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall inhibit gear shifting when engine speed exceeds safe operating limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject shift commands when Engine_Speed exceeds Max_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Max_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Engine_Speed <= Max_RPM THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Engine_Speed > Max_RPM AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Engine_Speed > Critical_RPM THEN Trigger_Engine_Protection

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall inhibit gear shifting when the gear actuator is not ready.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable shift commands when Shift_Actuator_Status equals Not_Ready.

L4_requirements: IF Shift_Actuator_Status = Not_Ready THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Shift_Actuator_Status = Ready THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Shift_Actuator_Status = Fault THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Shift_Actuator_Status = Not_Ready AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Shift_Actuator_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear shifts when transmission temperature reaches critical levels.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit gear shifts when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Critical_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Critical_Temp THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Emergency_Temp THEN Trigger_Thermal_Protection

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent shifting when clutch slip exceeds safe limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit shift commands when Clutch_Slip exceeds Slip_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Clutch_Slip > Slip_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Clutch_Slip <= Slip_Limit THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Clutch_Slip_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Clutch_Slip > Slip_Limit AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Clutch_Slip > Critical_Slip THEN Trigger_Clutch_Protection

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall inhibit gear shifting when engine torque exceeds safe limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject shift commands when Engine_Torque exceeds Torque_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Torque > Torque_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Engine_Torque <= Torque_Limit THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Torque_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Engine_Torque > Torque_Limit AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Engine_Torque > Critical_Torque THEN Trigger_Torque_Protection

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall inhibit shifting during reverse-to-drive transitions at high speeds.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject shift commands when Gear_Position equals Reverse and Vehicle_Speed exceeds Safe_Transition_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Position = Reverse AND Vehicle_Speed > Safe_Transition_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Safe_Transition_Speed THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Gear_Position = Reverse AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Vehicle_Speed > Critical_Speed THEN Trigger_Safety_Alert

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall inhibit gear shifts during clutch overheating conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable shift commands when Clutch_Temperature exceeds Clutch_Temp_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Clutch_Temperature > Clutch_Temp_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Clutch_Temperature <= Clutch_Temp_Limit THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Clutch_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Clutch_Temperature > Clutch_Temp_Limit AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Clutch_Temperature > Emergency_Clutch_Temp THEN Trigger_Clutch_Protection

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall inhibit gear shifts when ECU diagnostics are active.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable shift commands when Diagnostic_Mode equals Active.

L4_requirements: IF Diagnostic_Mode = Active THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Diagnostic_Mode = Inactive THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Diagnostic_Mode = Active AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Diagnostic_Mode = Active THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Diagnostic_Mode = Active AND Fault_Status = Critical THEN Trigger_Diagnostic_Alert
